neighborhoods.name: Plaka / Monastiraki
neighborhoods.description: Historic neighborhoods at the foot of the Acropolis with neoclassical buildings, tavernas, and ancient ruins
neighborhoods.character: Ancient historic, tourist-heavy, walkable and vibrant

housing.predominantType: Apartments in neoclassical and older buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Athens. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Kifisia
neighborhoods.description: Affluent northern suburb with tree-lined streets, boutiques, and a cooler microclimate
neighborhoods.character: Upscale leafy suburban, boutiques, cooler climate

housing.predominantType: Villas, neoclassical houses, and modern apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Athens's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Kypseli
neighborhoods.description: Diverse central neighborhood being revitalized with new cafes, community gardens, and affordable housing

housing.predominantType: Apartments in modernist and older apartment blocks

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Kolonaki
neighborhoods.description: Elegant central neighborhood on Lycabettus Hill slopes with galleries, designer shops, and embassies
neighborhoods.character: Elegant urban, gallery district, diplomatic quarter
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
